_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Windrose
author: Contact@nimauria.co.uk
description:
Embark on a PvE survival adventure in the Age of Piracy. Fight on land and sea, solo or with friends. Build, craft and explore a vast open world filled with dark secrets.

Master soulslike combat, take on challenging bosses, command your ship, and plunder unspoken treasures.

This egg installs and runs the Windrose Dedicated Server using SteamCMD and Wine.

Features:
- Automatic installation via SteamCMD
- Configurable server settings via R5/ServerDescription.json
- Invite code-based server access
- Optional password protection
- Optional Direct IP connection support

Notes:
- Windrose does not currently provide a native Linux dedicated server build; this egg runs the Windows server through Wine.
- Dedicated server settings are stored in R5/ServerDescription.json.
- World data is stored under R5/Saved.
- Invite code access is the default connection method.
- Direct IP is optional and may require manual router, firewall, or NAT configuration depending on the host network.

Recommended specs:
- 8 GB RAM minimum (small servers)
- 12 GB RAM recommended (~4 players)
- 16 GB RAM recommended (larger servers)
- SSD storage recommended (~35 GB)
startup: wine /home/container/R5/Binaries/Win64/WindroseServer-Win64-Shipping.exe -log & WINDROSE_PID=$!; for i in {1..10}; do [ -f /home/container/R5/Saved/Logs/R5.log ] && break; sleep 1; done; tail -c0 -F /home/container/R5/Saved/Logs/R5.log --pid=$WINDROSE_PID 2>/dev/null || true

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Starting Windrose install..."

STEAM_USER="${STEAM_USER:-anonymous}"
STEAM_PASS="${STEAM_PASS:-}"
STEAM_AUTH="${STEAM_AUTH:-}"
SRCDS_APPID="${SRCDS_APPID:-4129620}"
AUTO_UPDATE="${AUTO_UPDATE:-1}"

if [[ -z "${STEAM_USER}" || "${STEAM_USER}" == "anonymous" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER="anonymous"
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}\n"
fi

cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps

echo "Downloading SteamCMD..."
curl -fsSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz

echo "Extracting SteamCMD..."
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd

cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
export HOME=/mnt/server

VALIDATE_FLAG="validate"
if [[ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "false" ]]; then
    VALIDATE_FLAG=""
fi

echo "Installing Windrose Dedicated Server (App ID: ${SRCDS_APPID})..."
./steamcmd.sh \
  +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
  +login "${STEAM_USER}" "${STEAM_PASS}" "${STEAM_AUTH}" \
  +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
  +app_update "${SRCDS_APPID}" ${VALIDATE_FLAG} \
  +quit

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -fv linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -fv linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

# Create default .pteroignore if it doesn't exist
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/.pteroignore ]; then
    echo "Creating .pteroignore for optimized backups"
    cat << 'EOF' > /mnt/server/.pteroignore
# Nimauria optimized backup rules
# Keeps only essential server data

*
!R5/ServerDescription.json
!R5/Saved/SaveProfiles/Default/RocksDB/**/Worlds/**
EOF
fi

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The display name of your Windrose server. This helps players confirm they are joining the correct server when using an invite code.

variables.name: Invite Code
variables.description: The invite code players use to join the server. It must be at least 6 characters and may only contain letters and numbers. It is case-sensitive.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: The maximum number of players allowed on the server at the same time. Up to 4 players is recommended for smoother performance.

variables.name: Enable Password
variables.description: Enable or disable password protection for the server. Set to true to require a password, or false to allow access using only the invite code.

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: The password required to join the server when password protection is enabled. Leave blank if you do not want to use a password.

variables.name: Auto Update Server
variables.description: Controls whether the server automatically checks for and installs updates during startup. Set to true to enable automatic updates or false to disable.

variables.name: World ID
variables.description: The ID of the world the dedicated server should load on startup. This must exactly match the target world's folder name and the WorldIslandId value used by the server.

variables.name: Server Executable
variables.description: The main Windrose server executable file.

variables.name: Use Direct IP Connection
variables.description: Enable or disable Direct IP connection mode for the server. Set to true to allow players to connect using the server IP and port instead of an invite code. When enabled, invite codes are not used.

variables.name: Server IP / Hostname
variables.description: The public IP address or hostname that players should use when Direct IP connection mode is enabled. Leave blank to use the server allocation address if handled automatically by your hosting environment.

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: The port used for Direct IP connections. This should usually match the server’s allocated game port.

variables.name: Bind Address
variables.description: The bind or proxy address used for Direct IP mode. Leave this at the default unless you know your network setup requires a different value.

variables.name: Server Region
variables.description: The connectivity server region to use when not using Direct IP mode. Leave blank to allow automatic server selection

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: The Steam application ID used by SteamCMD to download and update the Windrose Dedicated Server.

variables.name: Windows Install Mode
variables.description: Internal flag indicating that the server should be installed as a Windows application through SteamCMD.

variables.name: Steam Username
variables.description: The Steam account name used for SteamCMD installation. Leave as anonymous unless a future server distribution requires an authenticated login.

variables.name: Steam Password
variables.description: The Steam password used with SteamCMD when a non-anonymous Steam login is required. Leave blank for anonymous installation.

variables.name: Steam Auth Token
variables.description: Optional Steam Guard or authentication token used with SteamCMD for authenticated installs. Leave blank unless needed.

variables.name: Wine Architecture (Do Not Change)
variables.description: Wine architecture used by the server runtime. Do not change this unless you know exactly what you are doing.

variables.name: Wine Debug Mode
variables.description: Wine debug output level. Leave this as default unless troubleshooting.
